blocks.text: Folding Cartons Manufacturer Vietnam – Precision Printed Consumer Packaging

XinYuan produces folding cartons that combine structure, sustainability, and standout shelf appeal.Our Vietnam and China production facilities deliver high-quality printed cartons for retail, cosmetics, food, electronics, and FMCG brands worldwide.Every box is designed for strength, precision, and automated efficiency, ensuring your product arrives safely and looks exceptional at point of sale.
Key Features:
• Premium offset and digital printing for perfect color consistency
Premium offset and digital printing for perfect color consistency
• Custom die-cut shapes, window patching, and lamination options
Custom die-cut shapes, window patching, and lamination options
• 100% recyclable, FSC-certified paperboard with eco inks
100% recyclable, FSC-certified paperboard with eco inks
• High-gloss, matte, or soft-touch coatings available
High-gloss, matte, or soft-touch coatings available
• Lightweight yet rigid design ideal for retail and e-commerce
Lightweight yet rigid design ideal for retail and e-commerce
About Our Manufacturing

XinYuan operates fully integrated carton plants equipped with Heidelberg XL presses, CTP color proofing, and auto-folding/gluing lines.Our G7-certified printing ensures consistent brand colors, while ISO 9001 production standards guarantee precision at every stage.With monthly output surpassing 80 million cartons, we deliver scalable capacity and unmatched reliability for global clients seeking both quality and sustainability.
Sustainability & Innovation
Applications
End-to-End Production Support
XinYuan focuses on responsible material sourcing and low-waste production.We print with soy-based inks, recover paper offcuts for recycling, and minimize coating waste.
Our R&D team continually develops new barrier coatings and structural designs that balance protection with eco performance.
Every carton produced aligns with global compliance standards such as FSC®, GMI, and ISO 9001 — reinforcing our commitment to sustainable packaging excellence.
• Food & Beverage – coated cartons for dry, chilled, or frozen goods
Food & Beverage – coated cartons for dry, chilled, or frozen goods
• Beauty & Health – luxury folding boxes with embossing or foil stamping
Beauty & Health – luxury folding boxes with embossing or foil stamping
• Electronics & FMCG – precision-fit cartons ensuring transport safety
Electronics & FMCG – precision-fit cartons ensuring transport safety
• E-commerce – flat-packed, lightweight boxes optimized for efficiency
E-commerce – flat-packed, lightweight boxes optimized for efficiency
From CAD design and color proofing to final assembly, XinYuan provides one-stop carton manufacturing.

Our packaging engineers collaborate with clients to fine-tune performance, reduce cost, and enhance brand perception.We deliver the same consistent quality whether you order 5,000 or 5 million cartons — all under strict international QC protocols.
Folding Cartons for Every Industry

XinYuan’s folding carton solutions integrate innovative structure with visual precision.We engineer packaging that protects products, supports automation, and communicates brand identity effectively.Whether you need retail sleeves, gift boxes, or food-grade cartons, our team provides end-to-end service from design to delivery.
